verbatim_quote: And this problem, this long context, really arises because we're trying to find the workarounds, which in turn is because the old rules of machine learning dictate that we can't change the model ways at test time. So, I mean, I guess the simple idea is, you know, what if we also do gradient descent on the model at test time?
